summary: Governance Dashboard Widget feature fully tested - Backend 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all UI elements verified). Widget renders correctly on Overview tab with all required data.
critical_code_review_comments: GovernanceWidget component correctly fetches data from /api/gs1/governance-overview endpoint
Widget displays 4 stat cards: Active Rules (1), Total Rules (1), Open Disputes (1), Resolved/Closed (6)
Rules by Type section shows 'voting (1)' badge with correct styling
Disputes by Priority shows breakdown: Critical (2), High (2), Medium (1), Low (2) with colored dots
Dispute Status chips show: Open: 1, Resolved: 1, Closed: 5 with appropriate colors
Recent Disputes list shows 5 items with title, dispute_type, label_id, and status badge
Open badge '1 open' appears correctly when there are open/under_review/escalated disputes
Widget uses proper data-testid attributes for testing: governance-widget, governance-open-badge, recent-dispute-{id}
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing label_governance and label_disputes collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance Dashboard Widget feature fully implemented and tested on /gs1-licensing page Overview tab. Backend endpoint GET /api/gs1/governance-overview (public, no auth required) aggregates data from label_governance and label_disputes MongoDB collections. Returns governance object (total_rules, active_rules, draft_rules, inactive_rules, rules_by_type) and disputes object (total_disputes, open_disputes, under_review, resolved_disputes, escalated_disputes, closed_disputes, disputes_by_priority, recent_disputes). Frontend GovernanceWidget component (line ~39 in GS1LicensingHub.jsx) renders at bottom of OverviewTab. Current data: 1 active voting rule, 7 total disputes (1 open, 1 resolved, 5 closed), priorities: 2 critical, 2 high, 1 medium, 2 low. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.GET /api/gs1/governance-overview: PASS - Returns governance and disputes data with correct structure
backend_endpoints.disputes.recent_disputes: PASS - Returns 5 most recent disputes with required fields

frontend_components.Disputes by Priority breakdown: PASS - Shows Critical (2), High (2), Medium (1), Low (2) with colored dots
frontend_components.Dispute Status chips: PASS - Shows Open: 1, Resolved: 1, Closed: 5 with appropriate colors
frontend_components.Recent Disputes list: PASS - Shows 5 items with title, dispute_type, label_id, status badge

mocked_data_note: No mocked APIs - all data from real MongoDB collections (label_governance, label_disputes)
